tic/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7119461729137855528","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝穿越，直接成为特利迦奥特曼中的主角真中剑悟。
既然身为光之战士斯麦路星人，面对黑暗巨人当然是要以最强悍的手段消灭。
“特利迦，我一辈子都不会原谅你的！”
卡尔蜜拉死死地盯着眼前的特利迦，却见特利迦奥一步步朝着自己走来，卡尔蜜拉的眼神之中瞬间多了一抹慌乱。
多年后……
“妈妈，爸爸封印你三千万年之后，到底对你做了些什么呀？”
小女孩坐在剑悟的腿上，有些好奇的看着卡尔蜜拉。
“这……”
卡尔蜜拉的俏脸上闪过一抹绯红，没好气的白了一眼正傻笑的剑悟。
卡尔蜜拉那娇嫩的红唇依旧如此诱人，剑悟像第一次见面时一样，再一次靠了过去。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c895e0e2fed9bf7a688addb0c9bd8e75","author":"似非斋","author_id":"","book_id":"7119461729137855528","book_name":"成为特利迦后，卡姐拉我去约会","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7119462608767287816","read_count":"12864","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1555008"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"658","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1550fc5fb62b3705991d802118e402b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318947&x-signature=8GICuAaB5auHlc4Y48gpfIg2rN4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1429819485333149","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.878678e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071546DE01A5DB11634B70B224"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
